case_title: JAMES PAYNE VS. MR CHUCK LANCE

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT LANCE, MR CHUCK AS TO PLAINTIFF PAYNE, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2008 - JUDGMENT. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFF SHALL GRANT DEFENDANT ACCESS TO DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE DURING USUAL BUSINESS HOURS IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO RECOVER THE VEHICLE FROM PLAINTIFF'S FACILITY. DEFENDANT SHALL TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTION TO REMOVE THE TRUCK FROM PLAINTIFF'S PREMISES.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LANCE, MR CHUCK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PAYNE, JAMES PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAYNE, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT LANCE, MR CHUCK
CERTIFIED MAIL GREEN CARD SERVED ON CROSS DEFT JAMES PAYNE RETURNED TO COURT.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR TRUST RECEIPT NO. 21448 BY DEFENDANT LANCE, MR CHUCK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-18-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "THE COURT GRANTS LEAVE TO FILE THIS LATE REQUEST FOR CONTINUATION; IN LIEU OF PERSONAL APPEARANCE, DEFT MAY SUBMIT WRITTEN DECLARATION, OR REQUEST APPEARANCE BY TELEPHONE" PER COMMISIONER. PARTIES ALREADY NOTIFIED BY PHONE AND MAIL ABOUT NEW HEARING DATE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED MAR-13-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PAYNE, JAMES
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF JAMES PAYNE REGARDING ADDITIONAL EXPENSES HE INCURRED FROM THE DATE HIS CLAIM WAS FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAYNE, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANCE, MR CHUCK $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,960.00, THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFF SHALL GRANT DEFENDNT ACCESS TO DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE DURING USUAL BUSINESS HOURS IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO REMOVE THE VEHICLE FROM PLAINTIFF'S FACILITY. DEFENDANT SHALL TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTIONS TO REMOVE THE TRUCK FROM PLAINTIFF 'S PREMISES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,257.00 FILED BY PAYNE, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT LANCE, MR CHUCK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LANCE, MR CHUCK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2007 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-15-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-01-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LANCE, MR CHUCK
